op.AKEKURI.potential.1.event.description.text: After recovering SP with skills, Akekuri gains ATK +10% for 10s. This effect can reach 5 stacks.

op.AKEKURI.potential.3.event.description.text: Ultimate SQUAD! ON ME! improved: While ultimate is active, entire team gains ATK +10%.

op.AKEKURI.potential.4.event.description.text: Ultimate SQUAD! ON ME! improved: Ultimate Energy cost -{1-costValue:0%}.

op.AKEKURI.potential.5.event.description.text: Talent Staying in the Zone improved: Even when the ultimate SQUAD! ON ME! ends, the Link buff persists for 5s.

op.AKEKURI.skill.BURST_OF_PASSION.event..text: A frontal slash that deals Heat DMG and applies Heat Infliction.

op.AKEKURI.skill.FLASH_AND_DASH.event.de.text: When an enemy becomes Staggered or hits a Stagger Node. Performs a returning dash with 2 thrust sequences, with each sequence dealing Physical DMG and recovering some SP.

op.AKEKURI.skill.SQUAD_ON_ME.event.descr.text: Enters a channeling state and fires 3 Rallying Flares. Each firing recovers some SP.

op.AKEKURI.skill.SWORD_OF_ASPIRATION_BAT.text: An attack with up to 4 sequences that deals Physical DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals {poise:0} Stagger.

op.AKEKURI.skill.SWORD_OF_ASPIRATION_DIV.text: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies.

op.AKEKURI.skill.SWORD_OF_ASPIRATION_FIN.text: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher that deals massive Physical DMG and recovers some SP.

op.AKEKURI.status.POSITIVE_FEEDBACK_P1.e.text: After recovering SP with skills, Akekuri gains ATK +10% for 10s. This effect can reach 5 stacks.

op.AKEKURI.status.COMMITTED_TEAM_PLAYER_.text: Ultimate SQUAD! ON ME! improved: While ultimate is active, entire team gains ATK +10%.

op.AKEKURI.talent.CHEER_OF_VICTORY_T1.ev.text: Combo skill Flash and Dash improved: For every 10 points of Intellect, SP Recovery +{sp_rate:0%} (max: {sp_cap:0%}).

op.AKEKURI.talent.STAYING_IN_THE_ZONE_T2.text: Ultimate SQUAD! ON ME! improved: When ultimate is active, gains Link.
